title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Sanji, Unknown person #2, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyone someone

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After what just took place... will bridges be burned...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not seriously just going to wait here are you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're right smack in the middle of enemy grounds right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember what pound told us about people who've managed to beat a commander in the past?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom sends in her enraged army along with her deadly storm to finish them off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you stay out in the open like, the enemies might...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: DAMJI BILL SOME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'B GUDDA BATT DERE!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where did these storm clouds roll in from?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahhh! ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's Wrong, King Baun?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On that mountain lies the whole cake chateau where Mama resides.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA... is infuriated- JU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You don't mean to tell me...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can a single human be- ing possess this kind of power?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Linlin is a woman with the ability to control and manipulate the weather.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once she crosses that line... there's absolutely nothing anyone can do to quell her rage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Lord Prime- Theus...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And Lord Zeus... Are Wreaking HAVOC!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is in a full blown rage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are the army that shall avenge Lord cracker!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Rattle Rattle

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Clear the way!! The enraged Army is coming through!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well look what we have here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please tell

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're going to hunt down and kill that "straw hat"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That moron did say he was gonna wait for you at that spot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Those guys are done for.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They're not getting out of this alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Thrifty" Bobbin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Demon Lady" Amant... Mont D'Or the Scribe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't even count high enough to add up the total bounty of all the heavyweights here!!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
